subject: Re: Missing information in optics.star file Warp to Relion 4.0.1
body:
Hi Philipp, 

I fixed it. Thank you for your input!
Cheers,

Felix

Felix Lange schrieb am Dienstag, 13. Juni 2023 um 14:41:38 UTC+2:

> Hi Philipp,
>
> Thank you for your reply! Is there a chance to pass this information via 
> relion_convert_star, or any other command?
> Thank you again and all the best,
> Felix 
>
> 3P1L schrieb am Dienstag, 13. Juni 2023 um 11:34:22 UTC+2:
>
>> Hi Felix,
>>
>> You’ll need
>>
>> _rlnVoltage #6
>> _rlnSphericalAberration #7
>> _rlnAmplitudeContrast #9
>>
>> And the corresponding columns with the data (300, 2.7, 0.07)
>>
>> Best,
>>
>> Philipp.
>>
>> Sent from my iPhone
>>
>> On Jun 13, 2023, at 10:50 AM, Felix Lange <felix.l...@gmail.com> wrote:
>>
>> ﻿Hi guys,
>>
>>
>> I am following the tt tutorial for the Warp-Dynamo-Relion pipeline with 
>> my own data. I extracted subtomograms in Warp at 5Apx according to the 
>> settings given in the tutorial. Now in Relion, the _optics.star is missing 
>> entries for the optics causing an error in Relion. The entry now looks like 
>> this:
>>
>>
>> data_optics
>>
>> loop_ 
>> _rlnOpticsGroup #1 
>> _rlnOpticsGroupName #2 
>> _rlnImagePixelSize #3 
>> _rlnImageSize #4 
>> _rlnImageDimensionality #5 
>>            1 opticsGroup1     5.000000           60            3
>>
>> How cann I pass along the missing information? Thanks and all the best,
>>
>> Felix 
>>
>> -- 
>> You received this message because you are subscribed to the Google Groups 
>> "Warp" group.
>> To unsubscribe from this group and stop receiving emails from it, send an 
>> email to warp-em+u...@googlegroups.com.
>> To view this discussion on the web visit 
>> https://groups.google.com/d/msgid/warp-em/71439f4a-69d2-4e69-b868-a4273852a257n%40googlegroups.com 
>> <https://groups.google.com/d/msgid/warp-em/71439f4a-69d2-4e69-b868-a4273852a257n%40googlegroups.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=footer>
>> .
>>
>>
